Class UserBlockList

java.lang.Object
com.jamii.social.controllers.UserBlockList
@Component public class UserBlockList extends Object
Service component for managing user block list records in the database.

This class handles user blocking functionality, allowing users to block other users from interacting with them. Blocked relationships can be tracked with different statuses.

Key functionality:

  • Fetch block list records by users and status
  • Add new block list entries
  • Fetch blocked user lists for a specific user
  • Save block list records individually or in batch

    • UserBlockList

      public UserBlockList()

  • Method Details

    • fetch

      public List<UserBlockListTBL> fetch(UserLoginTBL userid, UserLoginTBL blockedid, Integer status)
      Fetches block list records for a specific user-blocked user pair with status filter.
      Parameters:
      userid - the user who blocked another user
      blockedid - the user who was blocked
      status - the status to filter by
      Returns:
      list of block list records matching the criteria

    • fetch

      public List<UserBlockListTBL> fetch(UserLoginTBL userid, UserLoginTBL blockedid)
      Fetches all block list records for a specific user-blocked user pair.
      Parameters:
      userid - the user who blocked another user
      blockedid - the user who was blocked
      Returns:
      list of all block list records for the user pair

    • fetchBlockedList

      public List<UserBlockListTBL> fetchBlockedList(UserLoginTBL user, Integer status)
      Fetches all blocked users for a specific user with status filter.
      Parameters:
      user - the user to fetch the block list for
      status - the status to filter by
      Returns:
      list of blocked users matching the criteria

    • update

      @Deprecated public void update(UserBlockListTBL blockListTBL)
      Deprecated.
      Use save() instead which operates on the data field
      Updates a block list record in the database.
      Parameters:
      blockListTBL - the block list record to update

    • add

      public void add(UserLoginTBL userid, UserLoginTBL blockedid, Integer status)
      Adds a new block list entry.
      Parameters:
      userid - the user who is blocking another user
      blockedid - the user being blocked
      status - the status of the block

    • save

      public void save()
      Saves the current block list record from the data field to the database.

      The saved entity (with generated ID) is stored back in the data field.

    • saveAll

      public void saveAll()
      Saves all block list records in the dataList to the database in a batch operation.

      After saving, the list is cleared and repopulated with the saved entities (including any generated IDs).
